title: viburnum hanceanum
intro: Viburnum hanceanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae, native to Taiwan and southern China, also known as Taiwan Serviceberry or Chinese Cranberry. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Viburnum hanceanum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Traditionally, Viburnum hanceanum has been prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to make topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
